## Summary

- Describe the runtime, release, or operator impact.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run commit:check`
- [ ] `npm run commit:check:release` when native, OTA, packaging, or portable behavior changed

## Open Source Checks

- [ ] No secrets, env files, generated artifacts, cache state, or `.private-*` content were committed
- [ ] New source in this PR is intended to ship under `MPL-2.0`
- [ ] Cross-repo impact was called out when shared bundle or OTA contracts changed
